subcodes.title: Gul va Bulbul (The nightingale and the owl)
subcodes.first_line: The spiritual rose in the divine garden blossoms into mystical meanings at the approach of spring, but the artificial nightingales remain deprived.
subcodes.first_line_orig: گل معنوی در رضوان الهی بقدوم ربیع معانی مشهود ولکن بلبلان صوری محروم مانده اند گل
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @blind imitation [taqlid]
